data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department_name, c.course_type AS course_type, COUNT(c.id) AS course_count
FROM public.departments AS d
INNER JOIN public.courses AS c
  ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.name, c.course_type
ORDER BY d.name, c.course_type;

issues: INNER JOIN excludes departments with zero courses — use LEFT JOIN if you need departments with no courses included (and handle NULL course_type).

Vega-Lite will show separate bars per course_type within each department (grouped) by default; if you intended stacked bars (to compare totals per department) add a 'stack' or use y as sum(course_count) with appropriate layer/stacking settings.
Vega-Lite may not preserve the SQL ORDER BY for nominal x categories; if you need a specific ordering of departments, set encoding.x.sort explicitly.
